turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Requesting Maintenance or Repairs in a Rental Property

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Let's role play so I can learn English. Scenario: Something is broken or needs fixing in my rental accommodation. I am are contacting my property manager or landlord to request a repair. You are the property manager or housing agent

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: : Sure! Happy to help. Hi there, this is Sam from Riverside Property Management. What seems to be the problem in your rental?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: : Hi Sam. Sorry to ringing you early in the morning but we are running out of hot water this morning. I think there was something wrong with water boiling system. It worked well yesterday night but stopped working today.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: : Alright, thanks for letting me know. Just to make sure I send the right technician, which unit number are you in?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: : Mine is unit 2. When will the technician come? I do not want to be pushy but it is quite difficult for us without hot water as the weather is currently very cold.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: : Sure, unit 2—got it. I’ll get someone out as soon as possible. To book the visit, what times today or this afternoon are you available for the technician to come by?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: : I would appreciate if they can come around 11 am to 1 pm as I can come home during the lunch break.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: : Alright, 11 am to 1 pm works. I’ll pencil that in. Just so the plumber can prepare, is your hot-water system gas or electric, do you know?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: : I'm not sure. We still have electricity applicants work well this morning.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: : Sure, no problem — that helps a little. Since you’re not sure, can you tell me where the hot-water unit is located in your place? (Usually outside, in a cupboard, or near the laundry.)

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: : It is in the corner, between the stove and the sink. I will be at home when the technician comes so no worries

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: : Alright, thanks — that sounds like an electric under-bench system, which is helpful to know. Before I confirm the booking, is there any leaking, tripping of power, or unusual noise coming from the unit?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: : Nothing like that

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: : Alright, good to know there’s no leaking or power issues. Just so the technician can enter smoothly, is there any gate code, key access detail, or anything special they should know when arriving at unit 2?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: : Please just knock on the door and I will let them in

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: : Alright, a simple knock works. Just for the booking record, what name should I give the technician for the visit?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: : It's Kate

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: : Alright, thanks Kate — I’ll book the technician for the 11 am–1 pm window. Before I send the final request, is there anything else in the unit that needs checking while they’re there?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: : Not right now I guess. Everything else seems fine except for the hot water

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: : Sure, good to hear everything else is fine. Just in case the technician needs to reach you directly, what’s the best phone number for them to call when they’re on the way?
